src_raw: 聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）在2020年繼續暢順有序地運作。聯匯制度自1983年實施至今，渡過一次又一次的難關，充分展現出抵禦衝擊的能力。儘管面對疫情及波動的宏觀經濟環境，年內港元匯率一直保持平穩。強方兌換保證合共被觸發85次，累計資金流入約3,835億港元。
mt_raw: The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) continued to operate smoothly and orderly in 2020. Since its implementation in 1983, the LERS has weathered multiple crises, demonstrating its resilience against shocks. Despite the pandemic and volatile macroeconomic conditions, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate remained stable throughout the year. Strong-side Convertibility Undertakings (CUs) were triggered 85 times during the year, resulting in approximately HK$383.5 billion in capital inflows.

src_raw: 聯匯制度得以維持穩健，全賴多年來所建立的穩固根基。正如國際貨幣基金組織在其《2020年對外部門報告》中的總結指出，聯匯制度的公信力建基於具高透明度的運作規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融監管、靈活的經濟及審慎的財政制度。同時，金管局透過與業界緊密聯繫，以及透過傳統及社交媒體與公眾有效溝通，迅速澄清謠言，並適時提供有關事實與數據的最新資訊。金管局亦利用最新的科技與數據分析技術，繼續提升監察能力，以靈活應對最新市況及新出現的風險。
mt_raw: The LERS' robustness stems from its solid foundation built over many years. Additionally, the HKMA maintains close communication with the industry and effectively communicates with the public through traditional and social media channels, promptly clarifying rumors and providing timely information and data. The HKMA also continues to enhance its monitoring capabilities using advanced technology and data analytics to flexibly respond to current market situations and emerging risks.

src_raw: 雖然疫情對經濟造成沉重壓力，但銀行體系維持穩健，資本及流動資金充裕。於2020年底，本地銀行的資本充足比率為20.7%，遠高於國際最低要求的8%。大型銀行的平均流動性覆蓋比率亦遠高於法定最低要求的100%，於2020年第4季達到155.1%。受疫情影響，銀行的資產質素略為轉差，特定分類貸款比率於2020年底上升至0.9%，但仍屬穩健並遠低於自2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。
mt_raw: Although the pandemic imposed significant pressure on the economy, the banking sector maintained its solidity with sufficient capital and liquidity. By the end of 2020, the capital adequacy ratio of local banks reached 20.7%, far exceeding the international minimum requirement of 8%. The average liquidity coverage ratio (LCR) of major banks also significantly exceeded the statutory minimum requirement of 100%, reaching 155.1% in Q4 2020. While the pandemic affected asset quality slightly, the classified loan ratio increased to 0.9% by the end of 2020, still remaining healthy and well below the long-term average of 1.8% since 2000.

src_raw: 銀行體系在經濟與社會中扮演重要的金融中介角色。年內金管局一方面繼續重點監管銀行的信用及流動性風險，另一方面亦密切留意疫情對銀行營運的影響，並採取多項措施，確保銀行體系能繼續提供基本服務，以及提供貸款支持經濟。金管局在3月下調逆周期緩衝資本比率100基點至1%，又在4月調低監管儲備水平。這些措施為銀行體系合共釋放約1萬億港元的借貸空間。
mt_raw: The banking system plays a crucial role as a financial intermediary in the economy and society. Throughout the year, the HKMA focused on closely supervising credit and liquidity risks of banks while simultaneously closely monitoring the impact of the pandemic on banking operations. We implemented various measures to ensure the banking system could continue to provide essential services and offer loans to support the economy. In March, the HKMA reduced the Countercyclical Capital Buffer (CCB) requirement by 100 basis points to 1%, and in April, it lowered the prudential reserve level. These measures collectively released approximately HK$1 trillion in lending capacity for the banking sector.

terms: {'中小企': 'sme', '百分百擔保特惠貸款': 'Special 100% Loan Guarantee', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '預先批核還息不還本': 'PPPHS'}
src_raw: 我們深知中小企在當前的經濟環境下或會面對資金周轉壓力。因此，金管局聯同我們在2019年成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制推出多輪紓困措施，包括「預先批核還息不還本」計劃，將合資格企業的所有貸款本金還款延期6個月。截至2020年底，銀行共批出超過58,000宗貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉資超過7,400億港元。鑑於疫情反覆，金管局因應情況將「預先批核還息不還本」計劃展期，並於2021年3月將計劃延長至2021年10月底。香港按揭證券有限公司亦在其中小企融資擔保計劃下推出「百分百擔保特惠貸款」，以紓緩中小企支付僱員薪金及租金的負擔。截至2020年底，共批出超過25,000宗申請，涉資約400億港元。該計劃在2021年第1季作出優化，申請期限亦延長至2021年12月31日。年內銀行亦批出超過28,000宗紓困措施申請，協助個人客戶的資金周轉，涉資440億港元。銀行業同心協力，支持企業及個人客戶，共渡時艱，實在令人鼓舞。
mt_raw: We understand that small and medium enterprises (SMEs) may face cash flow pressures in the current economic environment. Therefore, the HKMA, together with the Banking Sector SME Lending Coordination Mechanism established in 2019, launched several rounds of relief measures, including the Pre-approved Payment Holiday Scheme (PPPHS), which extended the repayment period for eligible businesses' principal repayments by six months. By the end of 2020, banks had approved more than 58,000 cases of loan deferrals and other support measures, amounting to over HK$740 billion. Given the repeated outbreaks of the virus, the HKMA extended the PPPHS and prolonged the scheme until the end of October 2021. The Hong Kong Mortgage Corporation Limited also introduced the Special 100% Loan Guarantee Scheme, which helped alleviate SMEs' burdens in paying employees' salaries and rent. By the end of 2020, over 25,000 applications had been approved, totaling approximately HK$40 billion. The scheme was optimized in the first quarter of 2021, extending the application deadline to December 31, 2021. During the year, banks also approved over 28,000 relief measure applications, assisting individual customers with cash flow issues, amounting to HK$44 billion. The banking sector's collective efforts to support businesses and individual customers through these difficult times are truly commendable.

src_raw: 隨着科技長足發展，銀行業的經營環境亦急速轉變。因此，金管局的工作不僅限於應對當前的挑戰，亦要放眼未來，擴大人才庫，以配合銀行業的日後發展。我們與香港銀行公會及香港銀行學會聯合展開「提升未來銀行業人才的專業能力」研究計劃，評估銀行業未來幾年的潛在人才缺口，並為銀行規劃清晰的路線圖，以期未雨綢繆，改善人才供應的情況。我們又推出「銀行業人才起動計劃」，為本地大學的應屆畢業生提供為期6個月的實習機會及銀行業相關的特定培訓，藉以為業界培育人才。在本港勞工市場的嚴峻時期推出此計劃，亦正好為有志加入銀行業的年青人提供機會。
mt_raw: With the rapid development of technology, the operating environment of the banking sector has undergone swift changes. Therefore, the HKMA's work goes beyond addressing current challenges; it also looks ahead to the future, expanding talent pools to meet the needs of the banking sector's future development. We have jointly initiated the "Enhancing Professional Capabilities of Future Banking Talent" research program with the Hong Kong Association of Banks and the Hong Kong Institute of Bankers, assessing potential talent gaps in the banking sector over the next few years and planning clear roadmaps for the industry to proactively improve talent supply. We also launched the "Banking Talent Programme," providing recent university graduates with six-month internships and relevant training opportunities in the banking sector to cultivate talents for the industry. Launching this program during the severe labor market conditions in Hong Kong provides young people who wish to join the banking sector with valuable opportunities.

src_raw: 第一個範疇是推動綠色及可持續金融。自2019年5月推出分三階段進行的措施以來，相關工作已取得理想進展。我們在2020年完成對47間銀行的「綠色基準」評估，發表白皮書及發出通告，就銀行管理氣候風險提供指引及分享經驗。我們亦全力推進第二階段的工作，制定銀行業管理氣候風險的監管架構。此外，我們會致力在2025年或之前按照氣候相關財務披露工作小組的建議，要求銀行就氣候相關資料作出披露。這將使香港成為亞洲區內首個作出相關具體要求的地區。
mt_raw: The first area is promoting green and sustainable finance. Since the three-phase measures were introduced in May 2019, significant progress has been made. In 2020, we completed the "Greenness Baseline" assessment of 47 banks, published a white paper, and issued guidance to help banks manage climate-related risks and share experiences. We also actively advanced the second phase of work, developing a regulatory framework for managing climate risks in the banking sector. Furthermore, we aim to require banks to disclose climate-related information according to the recommendations of the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD). This will make Hong Kong the first region in Asia to impose specific requirements on such disclosures.

src_raw: 為鞏固香港作為區內綠色及可持續金融樞紐，我們整體策略的其中一環，是與本地其他監管機構及國際社會合作，推進綠色金融議程。在本地方面，金管局聯同其他監管機構成立綠色和可持續金融跨機構督導小組，協調金融業的相關措施。該小組已經制定策略性計劃，促進香港的綠色及可持續金融的發展。在國際方面，金管局應國際金融公司的邀請，成為亞洲區域創始成員及首個區域執行理事，與其合力推動「綠色商業銀行聯盟」。聯盟旨在於全球金融市場推動綠色銀行業，並由亞洲開始，逐步擴展至其他地區。
mt_raw: As part of our overall strategy to consolidate Hong Kong's position as a regional green and sustainable finance hub, we are working with local regulators and the international community to advance the green finance agenda. Internationally, the HKMA has joined the International Finance Corporation (IFC) as a founding member and the first regional executive member of the Asian Regional Initiative, collaborating to establish the Green Banking Alliance. The alliance aims to promote green banking globally, starting with Asia and gradually expanding to other regions.

src_raw: 過去一年清楚顯示，金融科技能夠擴展我們的「工具箱」，以應對突如其來的衝擊。面對新冠病毒疫情，電子支付渠道發揮了前所未見的作用。自2018年9月推出快速支付系統「轉數快」至2020年底期間，「轉數快」已錄得690萬個登記賬戶。即使在社交距離措施的限制下，公眾仍能利用「轉數快」這個安全快捷及穩妥的方式收付及轉撥資金，令「轉數快」的平均每日交易量在2020年急增2.3倍。我們亦一直與政府合作，將「轉數快」的應用範圍擴大至繳付更多種政府及公共服務帳單。
mt_raw: Over the past year, it has become evident that fintech can expand our "toolkit" to address unexpected shocks. Facing the COVID-19 pandemic, electronic payment channels played an unprecedented role. From the launch of the Faster Payment System ("FPS") in September 2018 to the end of 2020, FPS recorded 6.9 million registered accounts. Even under social distancing restrictions, the public could use FPS, a safe, fast, and reliable method for transferring funds, leading to a 2.3-fold increase in the average daily transaction volume of FPS in 2020. We have also worked closely with the government to expand the scope of FPS to include payments for more types of government and public service bills.

src_raw: 此外，金融科技亦有助銀行提供更多元化及便利的銀行客戶服務。獲金管局發牌的所有8間虛擬銀行年內已經全數在香港開業。截至2020年底，在虛擬銀行開設的帳戶共有420,000個，總計客戶存款150億港元。其中部分虛擬銀行已經率先使用新類型數據進行信貸評估，以開拓新的客戶群及促進普及金融。金管局繼續推動在香港發展更具規模及更多元化的合規科技生態圈，作為「銀行易」措施的一部分，從而精簡監管規定，提升客戶體驗。除透過刊發通訊系列，以提高業界對合規科技應用的認知外，金管局亦發表白皮書，載述加快銀行業採用合規科技的兩年計劃。另外，金管局又展開「商業數據通」項目，以便中小企利用自身的數碼足跡更便捷地獲取銀行融資。
mt_raw: Furthermore, fintech helps banks provide more diverse and convenient banking services. All eight virtual banks licensed by the HKMA have officially commenced operations in Hong Kong. By the end of 2020, there were 420,000 accounts opened with virtual banks, with total customer deposits amounting to HK$15 billion. Some virtual banks have already started using new types of data for credit assessments to tap into new customer segments and promote financial inclusion. The HKMA continues to promote the development of a larger and more diversified regtech ecosystem as part of the "Banking Easy" initiative, streamlining regulatory requirements and enhancing customer experience. In addition to publishing a series of communications to raise awareness of regtech applications within the industry, the HKMA also issued a white paper outlining a two-year plan to accelerate the adoption of regtech in the banking sector. Moreover, the HKMA launched the "Business Data Connect" project to enable SMEs to access bank financing more conveniently through their digital footprints.

mt_raw: The fintech landscape is constantly evolving, and technological applications are becoming increasingly widespread. The HKMA must continue to maintain rigorous regulation. src_raw: 面對新冠病毒疫情，香港經濟在2020 年連續第二年收縮，並錄得歷年來最嚴重的跌幅。消費及旅遊相關行業尤其受到重創，其收縮幅度較整體經濟更大。與此同時，勞工市場急速惡化，通脹有所緩和。政府及金管局為應對嚴峻的經濟環境，推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施以支持經濟。新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期2021年經濟會恢復增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展以及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。
mt_raw: Faced with the COVID-19 pandemic, Hong Kong's economy contracted for the second consecutive year in 2020, recording its worst decline in history. Consumption and tourism-related industries were particularly hard-hit, experiencing greater contraction than the overall economy. At the same time, the labor market deteriorated rapidly, and inflation eased. In response to the severe economic situation, the government and the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) introduced the largest relief measures in history to support the economy. The rollout of COVID-19 vaccines is expected to restore normal economic activities, with the economy anticipated to resume growth in 2021. However, the strength and pace of economic recovery remain subject to numerous uncertainties related to the development of the pandemic, vaccine supply, coverage, and effectiveness.

terms: {'新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金融業': 'financial sector'}
src_raw: 受新冠病毒疫情打擊，香港經濟在2020年收縮6.1%，是連續第二年收縮，亦是有紀錄以來最嚴重的年度跌幅（表1）。經濟活動急跌主要是本地需求急劇收縮所致（圖1）。疫情爆發及相應的社交距離措施令本地消費活動受到重創。由於營商環境轉差，整體投資支出亦明顯減少。對外方面，儘管疫情導致供應鏈受干擾及全球需求萎縮，但部分受惠於中國內地迅速恢復生產和經濟活動，全年合計香港貨物出口僅略為下降。相比之下，由於封城、關閉邊境及旅客流量限制令全球旅遊業陷入停頓，所以香港服務輸出嚴重受挫。本地及轉口帶動的需求疲弱，亦令貨物進口及服務輸入轉差。由於進口總額下跌步伐較出口快，淨出口（貿易順差）為本地生產總值帶來支持（圖1）。按經濟行業分析，消費及旅遊相關行業，例如零售、住宿及膳食服務業受到的打擊尤其嚴重，收縮情況較整體經濟更差，而金融業則溫和增長。
mt_raw: Struck by the COVID-19 pandemic, Hong Kong's economy contracted by 6.1% in 2020, marking the second consecutive year of contraction and the most severe annual decline on record (Table 1). A sharp drop in domestic demand was primarily responsible for the rapid decline in economic activity (Figure 1). The outbreak and corresponding social distancing measures severely impacted local consumption. Due to worsening business conditions, overall investment spending also declined significantly. On the external front, although the pandemic disrupted supply chains and caused global demand to shrink, some sectors benefited from China's swift recovery in production and economic activities, resulting in only a slight decline in total goods exports for the year. In contrast, due to lockdowns, border closures, and travel restrictions, the global tourism industry came to a standstill, causing significant setbacks for Hong Kong's service exports. Weak demand driven by local and transshipment activities also led to deterioration in goods imports and service inputs. As the decline in import volume outpaced that of exports, net exports (trade surplus) provided support to the gross domestic product (GDP) (Figure 1). Analyzing by economic sectors, consumption and tourism-related industries, such as retail, accommodation, and food services, suffered particularly severe impacts, with their contraction exceeding that of the overall economy. Meanwhile, the financial sector experienced moderate growth.

terms: {'流動性': 'Liquidity', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '防疫抗疫基金': 'Anti-Epidemic Fund', '預算': 'budget requests'}
src_raw: 政府為應對疫情，透過2020至21年度《財政預算案》迅速推出歷來最大規模的紓困措施，並從「防疫抗疫基金」發放4輪補助，合共超過3,000億港元。這些措施包括向合資格居民發放一筆過10,000港元現金、透過「保就業」計劃提供工資補貼，以及為受疫情重創的行業提供一筆過資助、寬減租金及豁免收費。金管局則採取三管齊下的方式支持銀行業，從而支撐實體經濟。有關措施包括與銀行業積極協調，減輕企業及家庭的資金周轉壓力，釋放緩衝以提高銀行的借貸能力，並確保銀行有足夠流動性支持本地經濟活動。
mt_raw: In response to the pandemic, the government swiftly introduced the largest-scale relief measures in history through the 2020–21 Budget, disbursing four rounds of subsidies from the Anti-Epidemic Fund, totaling over HK$300 billion. These measures included one-time cash payments of HK$10,000 to eligible residents, wage subsidies through the "Job Protection Scheme," and one-off grants, rent reductions, and fee waivers for industries heavily affected by the pandemic. The HKMA adopted a three-pronged approach to support the banking sector, thereby sustaining the real economy. These measures included active coordination with the banking industry to alleviate liquidity pressures on businesses and households, releasing buffers to enhance banks' lending capacity, and ensuring banks had sufficient liquidity to support local economic activities.

terms: {'全球經濟': 'world economy', '名義工資': 'Nominal wage', '基本通脹率': 'underlying inflation rate', '消費物價指數': 'consumer price inflation', '紓困措施': 'relief measures', '通脹': 'inflation'}
src_raw: 通脹壓力在2020年明顯減弱。剔除政府一次性紓困措施的影響，基本通脹率放緩至1.3%，是2009年全球金融危機以來最小的升幅。基本食品（尤其新鮮豬肉）的價格壓力明顯減退；而自行烹煮以外，由於飲食業提供大幅度折扣，所以外出用膳的價格在下半年亦有所下降。隨着早前新簽訂的私人住宅租金回落，消費物價指數租金項目的增長亦回軟（圖2）。更廣泛而言，由於名義工資增長減慢及商業樓宇租金偏軟，本地營商成本壓力減少；而在疲弱的全球經濟狀況下，進口價格通脹有所緩和。
mt_raw: Inflation pressure significantly weakened in 2020. Excluding the impact of the government's one-time relief measures, the underlying inflation rate slowed to 1.3%, the smallest increase since the global financial crisis in 2009. Price pressures for basic food items (especially fresh pork) notably eased; meanwhile, dining-out prices fell in the second half of the year due to substantial discounts offered by the catering industry outside home cooking. With the recent signing of private residential leases declining, the growth in the consumer price index (CPI) housing component also softened (Figure 2). More broadly, with slower nominal wage growth and softer commercial property rents, local business cost pressures decreased; and with the weak global economic outlook, import price inflation also eased.

terms: {'勞工市場': 'labour market', '名義工資': 'Nominal wage', '沙士': 'SARS', '私營機構': 'private-sector', '經季節性調整': 'seasonally adjusted'}
src_raw: 勞工市場在2020年急速惡化。經季節性調整的失業率年內由3.3%飆升至6.6%，為16年的高位（圖3），其中零售、住宿及膳食服務等受疫情重創行業的失業率達到10%以上。就業不足率亦於8月升至3.8%，為沙士疫情後的高位。部分由於經濟狀況急速惡化造成的周期性反應，勞動人口參與率輕微減少。總就業人數（圖3）及私營機構職位空缺急跌，反映整體勞工需求進一步收縮。名義工資及收入增長進一步放緩。政府推出「保就業」計劃，為僱主提供有時限的財政支援以保留僱員，使勞工市場獲得一定程度的支持。
mt_raw: The labour market deteriorated rapidly in 2020. The seasonally adjusted unemployment rate surged from 3.3% to 6.6% during the year, reaching a 16-year high (Figure 3), with unemployment rates in sectors heavily hit by the pandemic, such as retail, accommodation, and food services, exceeding 10%. The underemployment rate also rose to 3.8% in August, the highest level since the SARS epidemic. Partly due to the cyclical reaction caused by the rapid deterioration of the economic situation, the labor force participation rate slightly declined. Total employment (Figure 3) and private-sector job vacancies plummeted, reflecting further contraction in overall labor demand. Nominal wage and income growth further slowed. The government launched the "Job Protection Scheme," providing temporary financial support to employers to retain employees, offering some support to the labor market.

terms: {'中央銀行': 'central banking', '恒生指數': 'Hang Seng Index', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '首次公開招股': 'initial public offerings'}
src_raw: 隨着新冠病毒疫情爆發，恒生指數在首季急跌至3年低位。繼各國中央銀行及政府推出大型支持措施後，股市在第2季及第3季略為回穩（圖4）。由於新冠病毒疫苗研發出現突破，股市於接近年底時重拾一些上升動力。恒生指數於年底收報27,231點，全年計錄得3.4%跌幅。受惠於內地企業在香港的第二上市活動，2020年本港首次公開招股集資總額約4,000億港元，以集資額計全球排名第二。
mt_raw: With the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hang Seng Index fell sharply to a three-year low in the first quarter. After major central banks and governments introduced large-scale supportive measures, stock markets stabilized somewhat in the second and third quarters (Figure 4). Due to breakthroughs in the development of COVID-19 vaccines, stock markets regained some upward momentum near year-end. The Hang Seng Index closed at 27,231 points at year-end, recording a 3.4% decline for the year. Benefiting from the secondary listings of mainland companies in Hong Kong, the total fundraising amount of initial public offerings (IPOs) in Hong Kong reached approximately HK$400 billion in 2020, ranking second globally in terms of fundraising volume.

src_raw: 部分受到超低利率所支持，住宅物業市場在2020年大致平穩（圖4）。整體樓價及成交量較前一年均無大變動。然而，由於家庭住戶入息減少，置業負擔能力更為偏緊。另一方面，非住宅物業市場進一步轉弱，物業價格錄得不同程度跌幅，成交量亦見底。受經濟下滑及空置率上升的影響，寫字樓及零售物業租金大幅下跌。鑑於2019年以來非住宅物業市場已出現大幅調整，並預期會持續受壓，加上考慮到經濟基調及外圍環境等其他因素，金管局於8月調整非住宅物業的逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施。政府因應市場需求回落，亦於11月撤銷購置非住宅物業的雙倍從價印花稅這項需求管理措施。
mt_raw: Supported by ultra-low interest rates, the residential property market remained relatively stable in 2020 (Figure 4). Overall house prices and trading volumes showed little change compared to the previous year. However, due to reduced household incomes, housing affordability became tighter. On the other hand, the non-residential property market further weakened, with property prices recording varying degrees of declines and trading volumes hitting rock bottom. Due to the economic downturn and rising vacancy rates, office and retail space rents dropped significantly. Given the significant adjustments in the non-residential property market since 2019 and the expectation of continued pressure, along with considerations of the economic fundamentals and external environment, the HKMA adjusted the countercyclical macroprudential measures for non-residential properties in August. In response to the decline in market demand, the government also abolished the Doubled Ad Valorem Stamp Duty for purchasing non-residential properties in November.

terms: {'實質本地生產總值': 'real GDP', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '私營機構': 'private-sector'}
src_raw: 新冠病毒疫苗接種可望使經濟活動回復正常，預期香港經濟在2021年（全年合計）重拾正增長，然而經濟復甦的力度及步伐仍受疫情發展及疫苗供應、覆蓋範圍和成效等眾多不明朗因素影響。具體而言，疫苗廣泛接種需時，因此本地經濟在2021年早段仍面對相當程度的挑戰。對外方面，預計內地經濟會進一步增強，並為香港貨物及服務輸出帶來支持，然而其他主要經濟體的復甦步伐將取決於其大規模接種疫苗計劃的成效。政府預測2021年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎3.5至5.5%之間，與國際組織及私營機構分析員對香港最新的增長預測平均4.4%相符。
mt_raw: The rollout of COVID-19 vaccines is expected to restore normal economic activities, with the economy anticipated to resume growth in 2021. However, the strength and pace of economic recovery remain subject to numerous uncertainties related to the development of the pandemic, vaccine supply, coverage, and effectiveness. Specifically, the widespread vaccination will take time, so the local economy will still face considerable challenges in the early part of 2021. Externally, it is expected that the mainland economy will further strengthen, supporting Hong Kong's goods and service exports. However, the recovery pace of other major economies will depend on the effectiveness of their large-scale vaccination programs. The government forecasts that the real GDP growth rate for 2021 will range between 3.5% and 5.5%, which aligns with the average growth forecast of 4.4% for Hong Kong by international organizations and private sector analysts.

src_raw: 鑑於環球及本地經濟狀況仍具挑戰，預期2021年的通脹壓力將維持輕微。此外，早前新簽訂私人住宅租金回落的傳遞效應，將繼續令本地通脹受到抑制。市場共識預測2021年整體通脹率為1.5%，而政府預期整體及基本通脹率分別為1.6%及1%。由於經濟前景在2021年早段仍具挑戰，加上私營機構分析員預計2021年全年失業率仍會在約5.9%的偏高水平，因此短期內勞工市場將繼續受壓。
mt_raw: Given the ongoing challenges in the global and local economic situations, inflationary pressures are expected to remain mild in 2021. Additionally, the transmission effect of the recent decline in new private residential leases will continue to suppress local inflation. Market consensus predicts that the headline inflation rate for 2021 will be 1.5%, while the government expects the headline and underlying inflation rates to be 1.6% and 1%, respectively. Due to the challenging economic outlook in the early part of 2021 and the private-sector analysts' prediction that the unemployment rate will remain at a relatively high level of around 5.9% for the full year, the labor market will continue to face pressure in the short term.

src_raw: 2020年銀行體系資產負債表擴大5.7%。由於經濟下滑，年內貸款增長減慢至1.2%，相比2019年的增幅為6.7%；其中在香港使用的貸款增加2.2%，在香港境外使用的貸款微增0.1%，貿易融資減少6.2%。2020年中國內地相關貸款微跌0.2%，相比2019年錄得7.4%的增長。
mt_raw: Banking sector balance sheets expanded by 5.7% in 2020. src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情增加不確定因素，港元外匯及貨幣市場運作暢順有序。受到大量股票相關的資金流入所支持，港元匯率於2020 年內大部分時間偏強，而強方兌換保證多次被觸發。聯繫匯率制度是香港金融體系的基石，充分展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: Despite the uncertainties brought by the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hong Kong foreign exchange and money markets operated smoothly and orderly. Supported by substantial equity-related inflows, the Hong Kong dollar remained relatively strong throughout most of 2020, with the strong-side convertibility undertakings frequently triggered. The Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) remains the cornerstone of Hong Kong's financial system, demonstrating its strong resilience against shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong's monetary policy is to maintain monetary stability, i.e., to ensure the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, keeping it within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar. This monetary system primarily adopts the Currency Board Arrangement, which stipulates that the USD reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide at least 100% support for the monetary base. Any changes in the monetary base must be accompanied by corresponding adjustments in USD reserves, matching the changes in the monetary base on a 100% basis.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。當強方（或弱方）兌換保證被觸發，金管局會應銀行要求，按每美元兌7.75港元向銀行沽出港元、買入美元（或按7.85港元買入港元、沽出美元），使總結餘增加（或減少），令港元利率下跌（或上升），從而促使港元匯率回復到7.75至7.85 的兌換範圍。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and its firm commitment to fulfill the convertibility undertakings. When the strong-side (or weak-side) convertibility undertaking is triggered, the HKMA will sell HKD and buy USD (or buy HKD and sell USD) at the rate of 7.75 (or 7.85) HKD per USD upon request from banks, increasing (or decreasing) the aggregate balance, thereby lowering (or raising) the HKD interest rate and prompting the HKD exchange rate to return to the 7.75-7.85 convertibility zone.

src_raw: 隨着3月全球爆發新冠病毒疫情，避險情緒下環球投資者增持美元，令美元資金狀況明顯收緊。在聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）下，由於港元利率受同期美元利率影響，美元流動性緊張令香港貨幣狀況收緊。儘管其後美國聯邦儲備局實施流動資金計劃，美元資金壓力有所紓緩，但由於股票相關需求及季結效應，令香港貨幣狀況仍維持偏緊。而港元需求殷切，加上港元與美元的正息差刺激套息交易活動，促使港元匯率偏向強方兌換保證匯率（圖1），強方兌換保證最終於4月被觸發。其後新股集資活動暢旺，以及「滬港通」與「深港通」下的南向資金帶動股票相關資金流入，令港元一直維持接近7.75水平，並導致強方兌換保證在2020年內多次被觸發。強方兌換保證在4月21日至10月28日期間合共被觸發85次，累計資金流入3,835億港元。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2020年全年運作正常。
mt_raw: With the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic globally in March, investors' flight-to-safety sentiment led to tighter USD liquidity conditions. Under the LERS, since the HKD interest rate is influenced by the concurrent USD interest rate, tight USD liquidity conditions caused tightening in Hong Kong's monetary conditions. Although the US Federal Reserve implemented liquidity programmes later, the pressure on USD liquidity eased somewhat, but due to equity-related demand and quarter-end effects, Hong Kong's monetary conditions remained tight. The high demand for HKD, coupled with positive interest rate differentials between HKD and USD that stimulated carry trade activities, resulted in the HKD exchange rate tending towards the strong-side convertibility level (Figure 1). The strong-side convertibility undertaking was finally triggered in April. Subsequently, active initial public offerings (IPOs), along with capital flows under the Stock Connects, further supported the HKD, keeping it close to the 7.75 level and leading to multiple triggers of the strong-side convertibility undertaking during 2020. The strong-side convertibility undertaking was triggered a total of 85 times between April 21 and October 28, resulting in cumulative inflows of HKD 383.5 billion. Overall, the Hong Kong foreign exchange market functioned normally throughout 2020.

src_raw: 總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2019年底的11,330億港元，增加至2020年底的15,266億港元（圖2）。隨着強方兌換保證被觸發，金管局應銀行要求合共沽出3,835億港元。新冠病毒疫情引致環球宏觀環境波動，金管局為了提供額外港元流動性，亦於4月底及5月初逐步減發總計200億港元外匯基金票據。由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，總結餘（進行貼現窗活動前）由2019年底的543億港元，增加至2020年底的4,575億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由10,787億港元，稍降至10,692億港元，反映外匯基金票據發行量減少，這抵銷了按一貫做法以新發行的外匯基金票據及債券來吸納未償還外匯基金票據及債券的利息。整體貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: The Aggregate Balance (before discount window operations) and outstanding Exchange Fund bills and notes increased from HKD 1,133 billion at the end of 2019 to HKD 1,526.6 billion at the end of 2020 (Figure 2). With the triggering of the strong-side convertibility undertaking, the HKMA sold a total of HKD 383.5 billion to banks. The COVID-19 pandemic caused volatility in the global macroeconomic environment, and to provide additional HKD liquidity, the HKMA gradually reduced the issuance of Exchange Fund bills totaling HKD 20 billion at the end of April and early May. Due to the triggering of the strong-side convertibility undertaking and the reduction in the issuance of Exchange Fund bills, the Aggregate Balance (before discount window operations) increased from HKD 54.3 billion at the end of 2019 to HKD 457.5 billion at the end of 2020. The outstanding amount of Exchange Fund bills and notes decreased slightly from HKD 1,078.7 billion to HKD 1,069.2 billion, reflecting the reduction in the issuance of Exchange Fund bills, which offset the usual practice of absorbing the interest on outstanding Exchange Fund bills and notes through new issuances of Exchange Fund bills and notes. The overall monetary base remained fully supported by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 隨着農曆新年假期後流動性需求減退，香港銀行同業拆息在2月普遍下降（圖3）。踏入3月，由於美元資金壓力，連同新股集資相關及季結資金需求等本地因素，香港銀行同業拆息一度上升。其後由於強方兌換保證被觸發及外匯基金票據發行量減少，令總結餘增加，港元流動性狀況逐步紓緩。
mt_raw: Following the Lunar New Year holiday, liquidity demand declined, causing interbank interest rates to generally fall in February (Figure 3). Entering March, due to tight USD liquidity conditions, together with local factors such as equity-related and quarter-end fund demands, interbank interest rates rose temporarily. Subsequently, with the triggering of the strong-side convertibility undertaking and the reduction in the issuance of Exchange Fund bills, liquidity conditions improved gradually.

src_raw: 因應美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍於3月兩度下調，以及反映年內隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息變動，基本利率由年初的2.73厘下降至年底收報0.50厘。在零售層面，儘管美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍調低，銀行仍維持最優惠貸款利率不變。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2019年的383億港元降至2020年的91億港元。
mt_raw: In response to two cuts in the US Federal Funds rate target range in March, and reflecting the year's overnight and one-month HIBORs (Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates) movements, the Base Rate fell from 2.73% at the beginning of the year to 0.50% at year-end. In the retail front, despite the reduction in the US Federal Funds rate target range, banks continued to maintain their Best Lending Rates unchanged. Overall, the Hong Kong money markets continued to operate normally. Discount window lending decreased from HKD 38.3 billion in 2019 to HKD 9.1 billion in 2020.

src_raw: 過去30多年來，聯匯制度一直是香港金融體系的重要支柱，歷經考驗均能展現強大的抵禦衝擊的能力。儘管2020年面對挑戰，港元外匯及貨幣市場保持正常運作，一再證明聯匯制度穩健有效。年內面對一些毫無根據的謠言，質疑聯匯制度以至香港的金融穩定，金管局迅速向公眾重申香港會繼續實施聯匯制度，同時資金自由流動及港幣自由兌換受到《基本法》第112條保障。金管局另又發表多篇文章，闡明逆境下香港金融體系繼續展現強大抵禦衝擊能力的事實。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。香港的金融市場有序運作，以及港元繼續如常作為支付及保值貨幣，反映上述措施有效維持公眾對聯匯制度的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在《2020年對外部門報告》重申香港擁有具透明度的規則、充裕的財政及外匯儲備、穩健的金融規管與監管、靈活的經濟，以及審慎的財政架構，確保聯匯制度具公信力。
mt_raw: Over the past three decades, the LERS has been a crucial pillar of Hong Kong's financial system, consistently demonstrating its strong resilience against shocks. Despite the challenges faced in 2020, the Hong Kong foreign exchange and money markets maintained normal operations, repeatedly proving the robustness and effectiveness of the LERS. Throughout the year, there were some unfounded rumors questioning the LERS and Hong Kong's financial stability. The HKMA swiftly reassured the public that Hong Kong would continue to implement the LERS, while free flow of funds and free convertibility of the HKD are guaranteed under Article 112 of the Basic Law. The HKMA also published several articles explaining the facts that Hong Kong's financial system continues to demonstrate strong resilience against shocks. The government also firmly upheld the LERS. The orderly operation of Hong Kong's financial markets, as well as the continued normal functioning of the HKD as a means of payment and store of value, reflected the effectiveness of these measures in maintaining public confidence in the LERS. The International Monetary Fund (IMF) reiterated in its External Sector Report 2020 that Hong Kong possesses transparent rules, ample fiscal and foreign reserves, sound financial regulation and supervision, a flexible economy, and a prudent fiscal framework, ensuring the credibility of the LERS.

terms: {'利率': 'interest rate', '利率風險': 'interest rate risks', '壓力測試': 'stress-test', '外匯基金票據': 'Exchange Fund Bills', '持牌銀行': 'licensed banks', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '流動性': 'Liquidity', '流動資金安排': 'liquidity facilities', '環球金融市場': 'Global financial markets', '美元流動資金安排': 'US Dollar Liquidity Facility', '美元銀行拆借市場': 'US dollar interbank money markets', '聯匯制度': 'LERS', '貨幣及金融穩定': 'monetary and financial stability', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行貸款': 'bank lending', '銀行體系': 'banking sector', '風險管理': 'risk management'}
src_raw: 穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用。儘管新冠病毒疫情構成負面影響，香港銀行體系繼續運作暢順，流動性及資本水平以國際標準而言均非常充裕。為確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力，金管局一直密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行貸款的監管。與此同時，金管局亦為銀行體系提供更多流動性，維持貨幣及金融穩定。除減發外匯基金票據以增加港元流動性外，金管局為銀行設立一系列流動資金安排。此外，金管局與銀行保持聯繫，確保它們在緊張情況時利用這些流動資金安排。因應新冠病毒疫情為環球金融市場帶來波動及不確定因素，金管局推出臨時性美元流動資金安排，為持牌銀行提供美元流動性支援，有助紓緩環球美元銀行拆借市場流動性緊絀的情況。
mt_raw: A sound banking system plays a critical role in the smooth operation of the LERS. Despite the negative impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Hong Kong banking sector continued to operate smoothly, with liquidity and capital levels remaining very adequate by international standards. To ensure the banking sector's ability to withstand shocks, the HKMA has continuously monitored banks' credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as stress-test results, and maintained oversight of bank lending. At the same time, the HKMA provided additional liquidity to the banking sector to maintain monetary and financial stability. In addition to reducing the issuance of Exchange Fund bills to increase HKD liquidity, the HKMA established a series of liquidity facilities for banks. Furthermore, the HKMA maintained contact with banks to ensure they could utilise these liquidity facilities during tense situations. In response to the volatility and uncertainty caused by the COVID-19 pandemic in global financial markets, the HKMA introduced temporary US Dollar Liquidity Facilities to provide USD liquidity support to licensed banks, helping alleviate the tightness in the global USD interbank money markets.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2020年在109.8至112.1%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日收報109.9%（圖4）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，加上香港穩健的銀行體系，為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強而有力的後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance transparency of the Currency Board Account, since October 1998, part of the Exchange Fund's assets have been designated to support the monetary base. The backing ratio (the ratio of backing assets to the monetary base) fluctuated between 109.8% and 112.1% in 2020, without touching the upper or lower limits. The ratio closed at 109.9% on December 31 (Figure 4). Under the LERS, although certain Exchange Fund assets have been designated as part of the backing portfolio, all Exchange Fund assets remain available to support the HKD exchange rate. The substantial financial resources of the Exchange Fund, combined with Hong Kong's sound banking sector, provide a strong foundation for safeguarding Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會負責監察及探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2020年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括香港經濟的情景分析、香港物業市場的評估、了解跨境資金流的概念架構，以及了解香港銀行同業市場。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Issuance Committee, under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability. In 2020, the Currency Issuance Committee discussed topics including scenarios analysis of the Hong Kong economy, assessment of the Hong Kong property market, conceptual framework for understanding cross-border fund flows, and understanding of the interbank market. Meeting records of the Currency Issuance Committee and the HKMA's reports on the operation of the Currency Board system are available on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 疫情持續下，香港貨幣及金融研究中心（研究中心）在2020年仍能維持一定數量的研究成果。在2020年，研究中心合共發表20篇研究論文，涵蓋貨幣政策、銀行體系穩定、市場微觀結構和金融科技發展等廣泛議題，部份論文已獲接納或正被評審在專業期刊中刊登。在疫情下由於要實施社交距離及旅遊限制，研究中心舉辦的研討會、講座及到訪研究計劃等主要活動需要押後，待日後公共衛生和旅遊條件回復正常後，研究中心將會復辦上述活動。
mt_raw: Under the ongoing pandemic, the Hong Kong Institute for Monetary and Financial Research (HKIMR) maintained a certain level of research output in 2020. In 2020, the HKIMR published a total of 20 research papers covering a wide range of topics including monetary policy, banking stability, market microstructure, and development of fintech, with some papers accepted or undergoing review for publication in professional journals. Due to social distancing and travel restrictions during the pandemic, major events such as seminars, lectures, and visiting research programmes were postponed until public health and travel conditions returned to normal. The HKIMR will resume these activities once the situation improves.

src_raw: 截至2020年底，流通銀行紙幣（指發鈔銀行發行的紙幣）總值5,595億港元，較上年增加8.3%（圖5、6及7）。政府發行的流通紙幣及硬幣總值127億港元，較上年減少0.6%（圖8及9）。在政府發行的紙幣及硬幣中，10港元流通紙幣總值46億港元，其中塑質鈔票佔79%。
mt_raw: As of the end of 2020, the total value of banknotes in circulation (i.e., banknotes issued by note-issuing banks) amounted to HKD 559.5 billion, representing an 8.3% increase compared to the previous year (Figures 5, 6, and 7). The total value of government-issued currency notes and coins in circulation was HKD 12.7 billion, a decrease of 0.6% compared to the previous year (Figures 8 and 9). Among the government-issued currency notes and coins, the total value of HKD 10 notes in circulation was HKD 4.6 billion, with polymer notes accounting for 79%.

src_raw: 硬幣收集計劃於2014年10月推出，年內繼續廣受大眾歡迎。這是全球首個有系統的流動硬幣收集計劃，設有兩部收銀車輪流停駐全港18區。每部收銀車均裝設兩部高速硬幣點算機，市民可選擇將硬幣轉換成鈔票或用作八達通卡或電子錢包等儲值支付工具增值，亦可將款項放入車內的公益金捐款箱。此外，金管局與香港社會服務聯會合作，在非政府組織賣旗日派出收銀車收集硬幣。收銀車亦到訪學校，增進學生對硬幣收集計劃的認識。過去多年硬幣收集計劃曾獲頒多個本港及國際獎項，對其創新及環保的處理方法予以肯定。
mt_raw: The Coin Collection Scheme, launched in October 2014, remained popular among the public throughout the year. It is the world's first systematic mobile coin collection scheme, featuring two coin collection vehicles stationed in all 18 districts of Hong Kong in rotation. Each vehicle is equipped with two high-speed coin counting machines, allowing members of the public to choose to exchange coins for banknotes or use them to top up Octopus cards or e-wallets, or deposit the coins into the Community Chest donation boxes inside the vehicles. Additionally, the HKMA collaborated with the Hong Kong Council of Social Service to deploy the Coin Carts on flag days organised by non-governmental organisations. The Coin Carts also visited schools to raise students' awareness of the Coin Collection Programme. Over the years, the Coin Collection Scheme has received numerous awards both locally and internationally, recognising its innovative and environmentally friendly approach to handling coins.

src_raw: 儘管新冠病毒疫情爆發為經濟帶來重大挑戰，香港銀行體系於2020年維持穩健。年內金管局除密切留意疫情對銀行營運及監管活動的影響並靈活應變外，繼續將監管重點放在認可機構的信用及流動性風險管理上。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加及銀行業使用金融科技的上升趨勢，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及運作穩健性的監管。金管局亦與銀行及國際組織緊密合作，促進業界過渡至備用參考利率。
mt_raw: Despite the significant challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic to the economy, the Hong Kong banking system remained sound in 2020. In addition to closely monitoring the impact of the pandemic on bank operations and supervisory activities and responding flexibly, the HKMA continued to focus its regulatory efforts on credit and liquidity risk management of authorized institutions. Given the increasing cyber threats and the rising trend of Fintech adoption in the banking sector, the HKMA enhanced its oversight of technology risk management and operational resilience of authorized institutions. The HKMA also worked closely with banks and international organizations to facilitate the industry's transition to alternative reference rates.

src_raw: 在操守監管方面，金管局給予認可機構在遵守監管規定上彈性處理的空間以及提供指引，以便一方面協助銀行在疫情下的業務運作及繼續為客戶提供服務，另一方面則繼續確保投資者及消費者得到保障。金管局聯同有關當局制定「跨境理財通」業務試點的建議實施細則，並諮詢業界。金管局與證券及期貨事務監察委員會合作，就精簡有關家族辦公室及擁有高資產淨值並精於財務事宜的投資者的銷售程序提供指引。此外，金管局加強對數碼金融服務消費者的保障，並繼續推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: In conduct supervision, the HKMA provided authorized institutions with flexibility in complying with regulatory requirements and issued guidance to help banks maintain business operations during the pandemic while continuing to serve customers, and to ensure investor and consumer protection. The HKMA, together with relevant authorities, developed proposed implementation details for the pilot scheme of the Cross-border Wealth Management Connect and consulted the industry. The HKMA collaborated with the Securities and Futures Commission to provide guidance on streamlining sales procedures for family offices and investors with high net worth and financial expertise. Additionally, the HKMA strengthened consumer protection for digital financial services and continued to promote a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 在打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面，金管局迅速採取行動，不但釐清風險為本方法及科技如何協助認可機構更有效應對與新冠病毒疫情相關的情況，並同時審慎應對持續升溫的地緣政治緊張局勢對銀行體系造成的影響。金管局繼續支持有關提升打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集工作的成效與效率的措施，包括增加參與公私營夥伴共享訊息的認可機構數目，以及支持銀行業採用合規科技。金管局又順應科技及數據運用的國際發展趨勢，展開進一步加強打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集監察能力的計劃。
mt_raw: Regarding anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing (AML/CFT), the HKMA took swift action to clarify how a risk-based approach and technology could assist authorized institutions in more effectively addressing situations related to the COVID-19 pandemic, while carefully managing the impact of escalating geopolitical tensions on the banking system. The HKMA continues to support measures aimed at improving the effectiveness and efficiency of AML/CFT efforts, including increasing participation of authorized institutions in public-private information-sharing initiatives and supporting the banking sector's adoption of regulatory technology (RegTech). The HKMA also aligned with global trends in technological and data usage, launching further plans to enhance AML/CFT surveillance capabilities.

src_raw: 與此同時，金管局與銀行業緊密合作，優化監管政策與程序，以及推行提升人才專業能力的措施。香港在實施國際監管標準方面取得理想進展，包括資本充足標準和披露標準。在促進綠色及可持續銀行業的發展方面，金管局已進入三個階段中的第二階段，正制定相關監管規定。金管局亦繼續致力確保香港備有具公信力的認可機構處置機制，包括制定新處置標準及實施吸收虧損能力規定的規則，以提升認可機構的處置可行性。
mt_raw: At the same time, the HKMA worked closely with the banking sector to optimize supervisory policies and procedures, as well as implement capacity-building initiatives for talent development. Hong Kong has made satisfactory progress in implementing international supervisory standards, including capital adequacy standards and disclosure standards. In promoting the development of green and sustainable banking, the HKMA has entered the second phase of three stages, currently formulating relevant regulatory provisions. The HKMA continues to strive to ensure Hong Kong has a credible resolution regime for authorized institutions, including developing new resolution standards and implementing rules on loss-absorbing capacity requirements to improve the resolvability of authorized institutions.

src_raw: 金管局的整體目標之一是促進銀行體系的安全及穩定。要達致這個目標，實有賴建立及維持具高度應對能力且能為香港經濟提供所需關鍵金融服務的金融體系。
mt_raw: One of the HKMA's overall objectives is to promote the safety and stability of the banking system. Achieving this goal relies on establishing and maintaining a robust financial system capable of providing essential financial services required by the Hong Kong economy.

src_raw: 銀行可能因營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、應對危機及自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may affect the stability of the banking system through their operating methods, or in extreme cases, due to disorderly failures. As the regulatory authority, the Monetary Authority plays an important role in safeguarding financial stability, ensuring that banks have the capability to withstand shocks, manage crises, and return to normalcy, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Monetary Authority is responsible for prudent supervision of banks, as well as authorizing licensed banks, restricted license banks, and deposit-taking companies (collectively referred to as "authorized institutions"). The Monetary Authority is also responsible for the designation and regulation of certain financial market infrastructures.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦並非為確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，能有秩序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員在該機制下為認可機構（以及其他類型機構）的處置機制當局。為落實香港的處置機制，必須制定處置規則及政策標準、進行處置規劃以排除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置瀕臨倒閉認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the Monetary Authority cannot guarantee that the financial system is entirely free of risks, and the prudential regulatory framework in Hong Kong is not designed to ensure "zero risk." As one of the resolution authorities, the Monetary Authority aims to ensure that if an authorized institution becomes unsustainable, it can be resolved in an orderly manner. To this end, Hong Kong has established a financial institution resolution mechanism, under which the Monetary Authority serves as the resolution authority for authorized institutions (and other types of institutions). To implement Hong Kong's resolution mechanism, it is necessary to develop resolution rules and policy standards, carry out resolution planning to remove obstacles to the resolvability of authorized institutions, and establish the HKMA's operational capability to resolve failing authorized institutions. To effectively execute these tasks, the HKMA adopts internationally coordinated approaches.

mt_raw: The HKMA conducted 186 off-site reviews in 2020, covering a wide range of areas including CAMEL rating assessments, corporate governance, risk management, and fintech strategies of authorized institutions. To continue enhancing the risk governance level of authorized institutions, the HKMA held 30 meetings with boards of directors, independent non-executive directors, or committees under the board of directors of authorized institutions, and 30 tripartite meetings with authorized institutions and their external auditors.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局亦進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估屬較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行610次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查及評估的主要重點之一。另一個重點是在新冠病毒疫情下的業務操作風險及科技風險管理。此外，金管局又增加針對流動性及市場風險管理的現場審查及專題評估次數。同時，專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查及專題評估。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site review work, the HKMA also conducted regular on-site examinations, complemented by thematic assessments to examine high-risk areas. The HKMA carried out 610 on-site examinations and thematic assessments during the year, continuing to focus primarily on credit risk management in its examination and assessment processes. Another key area was operational risk and technology risk management in the context of the COVID-19 pandemic. Furthermore, the HKMA increased the number of on-site examinations and thematic assessments focusing on liquidity and market risk management. At the same time, specialist teams also conducted on-site examinations and thematic assessments of authorized institutions' securities, investment products, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF)-related businesses.

src_raw: 受到新冠病毒疫情影響，認可機構的資產質素略為轉差。年內銀行業的特定分類貸款比率由0.57%上升至0.90%，仍維持在穩健水平，遠低於2000年以來的長期平均水平1.8%。內地相關貸款方面，相關比率亦由一年前的0.75%上升至0.96%。
mt_raw: Due to the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, asset quality of authorized institutions deteriorated slightly. The classified loan ratio of the banking sector rose from 0.57% to 0.90% during the year, remaining at a sound level, far below the long-term average of 1.8% since 2000. For mainland-related lending, the corresponding ratio also increased from 0.75% a year earlier to 0.96%.

mt_raw: Given the significant challenges posed by uncertainties related to the COVID-19 pandemic to the economy, the HKMA thoroughly reviewed the asset quality of authorized institutions to assess the trend of deterioration in asset quality. Stress-test analyses conducted by the HKMA showed that banks were capable of withstanding the economic pressures brought about by the COVID-19 pandemic.

src_raw: 因應新冠病毒疫情爆發，金管局於2019年10月成立的銀行業中小企貸款協調機制（協調機制）推出多輪協助企業及個人客戶的紓緩措施，鼓勵銀行在審慎風險管理原則容許下繼續支持借款人的融資需要。其中最主要的是協調機制於5月推出的「預先批核還息不還本」計劃。計劃下合資格的企業客戶的所有貸款本金還款可延期6個月。該計劃在11月延長6個月後，在2021年3月再度延長6個月至10月底。該計劃約有100間銀行參與，覆蓋12萬合資格企業客戶。截至12月底，銀行共批出58,000多宗企業客戶貸款展期及其他支援措施的個案，涉及金額超過7,400億港元。個人客戶方面，銀行亦推出住宅按揭「還息不還本」計劃，「居者有其屋計劃」下資助房屋的相關按揭亦涵蓋在內。此外，銀行亦提供應急貸款予從事受疫情嚴重打擊行業的客戶、延長個人貸款期限，以及下調各種個人信貸的收費。截至12月底，銀行共批出28,000多宗住宅按揭「還息不還本」及其他個人應急貸款的個案，涉及金額超過440億港元。
mt_raw: In response to the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Banking Sector SME Loan Coordination Mechanism (Coordination Mechanism), established by the HKMA in October 2019, introduced multiple relief measures to support enterprises and individual customers, encouraging banks to continue supporting borrowers' funding needs within the principles of prudent risk management. The most significant measure was the "Interest-only Payment Extension Scheme" launched by the Coordination Mechanism in May, which allowed eligible enterprise customers to defer repayment of principal on all their loans for six months. This scheme was extended for another six months in November and then further extended until the end of October 2021. Approximately 100 banks participated in the scheme, covering 120,000 eligible enterprise customers. By the end of December, banks had approved over 58,000 cases of loan extensions and other support measures for enterprise customers, involving amounts exceeding HK$740 billion. For individual customers, banks also introduced the "Interest-only Payment Scheme" for residential mortgages, which included mortgages under the Home Ownership Scheme. In addition, banks provided emergency loans to customers in industries severely impacted by the pandemic, extended personal loan terms, and reduced fees for various forms of personal credit. By the end of December, banks had approved over 28,000 cases of "Interest-only Payment" and other emergency personal loans, involving amounts exceeding HK$44 billion.

src_raw: 金管局自2009年起先後推出多輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已經加強銀行的風險管理及香港銀行體系應對本港樓市一旦突然逆轉的抵禦能力。新批出住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數於2020年12月為57%，而有關按揭成數於2009年9月推出首輪逆周期措施前為64%。2020年新批出住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數有所上升，主要由於當中涉及按揭保險的貸款的佔比有所增加，而這類貸款的按揭成數一般較高。新批出按揭的平均供款與入息比率亦維持在低水平，於12月為37%，而在2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時為41%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Since 2009, the HKMA has implemented a series of countercyclical macroprudential measures to strengthen banks' risk management and enhance the banking system's ability to withstand potential downturns in the property market. The average loan-to-value (LTV) ratio for newly approved residential mortgage loans was 57% in December 2020, down from 64% when the first round of countercyclical measures was introduced in September 2009. The average LTV ratio for newly approved residential mortgage loans increased slightly in 2020, mainly due to a higher proportion of loans with mortgage insurance, which typically have higher LTV ratios. The average debt-service-to-income (DSI) ratio for new mortgages remained low at 37% in December, compared to 41% when the DSI ratio ceiling was first introduced in August 2010 (Figure 1).

terms: {'新冠病毒': 'COVID-19', '金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector'}
src_raw: 因應2020年初爆發新冠病毒疫情，金管局採取連串措施減低疫情對銀行業務運作的影響。有關措施包括要求認可機構檢討其持續業務運作計劃，並採取適當的預防措施，以保障員工與客戶的健康，以及維持重要銀行服務。此外，金管局提醒認可機構加強與員工及客戶的溝通，就其處所可能出現確診個案的情況作好準備，以及制定應對較為嚴峻但可能發生的風險情境的持續業務運作計劃。金管局與業界保持緊密聯繫，又要求認可機構保持警覺，並因應疫情的最新發展及政府的社交距離措施，不時審視其持續業務運作計劃。
mt_raw: In response to the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic at the beginning of 2020, the HKMA took a series of measures to mitigate the impact of the pandemic on bank operations. These measures included requiring authorized institutions to review their continuity of business operation plans and take appropriate preventive measures to protect employees and customers' health, as well as maintain critical banking services. Additionally, the HKMA reminded authorized institutions to strengthen communication with employees and customers, prepare for possible confirmed cases at their premises, and develop continuity of business operation plans to address more severe but potentially occurring risk scenarios. The HKMA maintained close contact with the industry and required authorized institutions to remain vigilant and regularly review their continuity of business operation plans in light of the latest developments of the pandemic and the government's social distancing measures.

src_raw: 金管局完成對「網絡防衛計劃」的全面檢討及廣泛的業界諮詢後，於11月推出「網絡防衛計劃2.0」，因應海外網絡風險管理的最新做法，進一步提升「網絡防衛計劃」。當中「網絡防衛評估框架」加入了有關網絡事故應對及恢復的最新國際穩健做法。「網絡防衛計劃」下的「專業培訓計劃」方面，資歷認證清單的範圍有所擴大，納入主要海外地區的同等資歷。金管局又向香港銀行公會（銀行公會）提出多項建議，令「網絡風險資訊共享平台」更易於使用。「網絡防衛計劃2.0」於2021年1月1日生效。
mt_raw: After completing a comprehensive review and extensive consultation with the industry on the "Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative," the HKMA launched the "Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative 2.0" in November, incorporating the latest international best practices in cybersecurity risk management. The updated "Cybersecurity Fortification Assessment Framework" includes the latest international benchmarks for incident response and recovery. The "Professional Training Programme" under the "Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative" expanded its list of recognized qualifications to include equivalent credentials from major overseas regions. The HKMA also proposed several recommendations to the Hong Kong Bankers Association (Bankers Association) to make the "Cyber Risk Information Sharing Platform" more user-friendly. The "Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative 2.0" came into effect on January 1, 2021.

src_raw: 經過在「金融科技監管沙盒」進行嚴謹的測試與試行後，所有在2019年獲發銀行牌照的8間虛擬銀行都已經於年內開業。虛擬銀行運用創新科技，提供全新的客戶體驗，例如利用大數據分析進行中小企貸款的信貸評估，以加快貸款批核程序。為加強客戶參與及建立客戶對品牌的忠誠，部分虛擬銀行更在其定期存款及獎賞計劃等服務中加入遊戲元素。
mt_raw: Following rigorous testing and trials in the "FinTech Regulatory Sandbox," all eight virtual banks that received banking licenses in 2019 commenced operations during the year. Virtual banks utilize innovative technologies to offer new customer experiences, such as using big data analytics for credit assessments of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) loans to expedite the loan approval process. To enhance customer engagement and build brand loyalty, some virtual banks have incorporated game elements into their savings accounts and reward programs.

src_raw: 香港位處內地金融市場對外開放的要衝，能充分把握開放過程中的契機。憑藉世界級的市場基建以及「滬港通」、「深港通」與「債券通」，香港既是深受內地企業垂青的集資平台，亦是國際投資者進入增長迅速的內地市場的窗口。年內在促進粵港澳大灣區金融合作，尤其便利香港居民在大灣區內使用金融及銀行服務方面取得良好進展。
mt_raw: Hong Kong's strategic position as a gateway to the opening up of mainland China's financial markets allows it to fully seize opportunities during this process. With world-class market infrastructure and initiatives such as the "Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect", "Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect", and "Bond Connect", Hong Kong serves as both a preferred fundraising platform for mainland enterprises and a window for international investors to access the fast-growing mainland market. Significant progress was made in promoting financial cooperation within the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA), particularly in facilitating the use of financial and banking services by Hong Kong residents within the GBA.

src_raw:
為鞏固香港的亞洲金融科技樞紐地位，金管局繼續致力實施各項措施，促進銀行及支付行業開發與應用科技。年內的主要進展包括：
- 推動更廣泛使用快速支付系統「轉數快」；
- 促進銀行業實施開放應用程式介面（開放API）；
- 連接貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」與中國人民銀行（人民銀行）轄下的貿易金融區塊鏈平台，促進貿易融資數碼化；
- 研究央行數碼貨幣於跨境支付的應用；
- 探討「商業數據通」的技術可行性及研究新類型信貸評分模型，以助中小型企業（中小企）獲取融資；
- 公布旨在發展更具規模及更多元的合規科技生態圈的兩年計劃，進一步推動合規科技的應用；
- 加強培育人才；及
- 推進跨境金融科技合作。

src_raw: 隨着主要金融市場指數開始加入內地在岸證券或增加其權重，流入人民幣資產的資金繼續加快步伐。香港得天獨厚，憑藉連繫內地資本市場的「滬港通」、「深港通」及「債券通」，在促進國際投資者增加人民幣資產配置方面發揮關鍵的作用。在2020年，「債券通」平均每日交易額增加82%，至約193億元人民幣。為完善「債券通」運作，金管局推出新措施，包括新設特別結算周期服務、延長交易時間及引入新安排，讓投資者在選擇銀行進行貨幣兌換與外幣對沖方面有較多彈性。繼「債券通」北向通取得成功，金管局又與人民銀行組成工作小組研究南向通的框架。
mt_raw: As major financial market indices began to include onshore Chinese securities or increase their weightings, flows into renminbi (RMB) assets continued to accelerate. Hong Kong, with its unique advantages through the "Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect", "Shenzhen-Hong Kong Stock Connect", and "Bond Connect" mechanisms connecting to the mainland capital market, has played a crucial role in enabling international investors to increase their RMB asset allocations. In 2020, the average daily trading value of the "Bond Connect" increased by 82% to approximately RMB 19.3 billion. To improve the operation of "Bond Connect", the HKMA introduced new measures, including a special settlement cycle service, extended trading hours, and new arrangements allowing investors greater flexibility in choosing banks for currency conversion and foreign exchange hedging. Following the successful implementation of the Northbound Bond Connect, the HKMA formed a working group with the PBOC to study the framework for the Southbound Bond Connect.

src_raw: 金管局亦繼續致力加強香港與粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）內地城市之間的金融配套措施。內地當局公布一系列政策措施，支持區內金融發展。於6月，人民銀行、金管局與澳門金融管理局（澳門金管局）聯合宣布決定實施跨境「理財通」。金管局一直與內地和本地當局以及業界緊密合作，制定有關實施細則。金管局亦就其他措施與內地當局保持聯繫，尋求為香港銀行擴大政策空間拓展更廣闊的跨境業務範疇。年內，香港繼續保持作為全球離岸人民幣業務樞紐的地位。香港的人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額創出1.2萬億元人民幣的新高。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to strengthen financial support measures between Hong Kong and cities in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA). The mainland authorities announced a series of policies supporting financial development in the region. In June, the PBOC, the HKMA, and the Macao Monetary Authority jointly announced the implementation of the Cross-Border Wealth Management Connect ("Wealth Connect"). The HKMA has been closely collaborating with mainland and local authorities as well as the industry to develop detailed implementation guidelines. The HKMA also maintains communication with mainland authorities regarding other measures, seeking to expand the scope of cross-border business for Hong Kong banks. Throughout the year, Hong Kong maintained its position as the offshore RMB business hub. The average daily transaction value of Hong Kong's RMB Real-Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system reached a new high of RMB 1.2 trillion.

mt_raw: The HKMA actively explores new opportunities to enhance Hong Kong's financial platform competitiveness. To promote the development of fund businesses in Hong Kong, the HKMA has worked closely with the government and the industry to create a more favorable tax and regulatory environment for funds to establish themselves locally. The HKMA has also invested significant effort in continuing to enhance Hong Kong's position as a regional green and sustainable finance hub. At the same time, the HKMA strengthens market promotion efforts to promote Hong Kong's financial services to overseas and Mainland stakeholders.

src_raw: 在中央銀行領域，金管局在多個區內及國際委員會擔當領導角色。例如，金管局為巴塞爾銀行監管委員會（巴塞爾委員會）轄下政策及標準小組，以及東亞及太平洋地區中央銀行會議(EMEAP)轄下金融市場工作小組主席。金管局亦擔任金融穩定理事會轄下非銀行監察專家小組及金融創新網絡聯席主席，並領導探討基準過渡相關監管事項的小組。
mt_raw: In the central banking field, the HKMA holds leadership roles in several regional and international committees. For example, the HKMA chairs the Policy and Standards Subcommittee under the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision (BCBS) and the Working Group on Financial Markets (WGFM) under the East Asian and Pacific Central Banks (EMEAP). The HKMA also serves as co-chair of the Non-Bank Monitoring Experts Group (NMEG) under the Financial Stability Board (FSB) and the Financial Innovation Network (FIN). Additionally, the HKMA leads a working group exploring regulatory matters related to benchmark transitions.

src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港的國際金融中心地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2020年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The safe and effective operation of Hong Kong's financial infrastructure provides a solid foundation for its status as an international financial centre. Four real-time gross settlement (RTGS) systems handling interbank transactions, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU), and the Hong Kong Trade Repository (HKTR) achieved 100% system availability in 2020, exceeding the target level of 99.95%. Through accounts with two central securities depositories in the mainland, the CMU system continues to assist in settling Northbound Bond Connect transactions and holding mainland debt instruments for related CMU system participants.

terms: {'香港身份證號碼': 'Hong Kong Identity Card number'}
src_raw: 自2018年9月轉數快推出以來，已有35間銀行及12間儲值支付工具營運商加入，其中在2020年增加了5間銀行及1間儲值支付工具營運商。轉數快使用量亦穩步增長。截至12月31日，轉數快共錄得690萬個登記（圖1）。為方便市民收取由機構發出的款項，轉數快於12月6日起新增以香港身份證號碼作帳戶識別代號。引入這項功能後不足1個月已錄得超過110,000個登記。這項新功能並非用於個人對個人轉帳，只供已有收款人身份證號碼的機構發放款項（例如發放薪酬）之用。由於每名市民的身份證號碼都是獨一無二，市民利用香港身份證號碼作為帳戶識別代號，即使不提供銀行帳戶號碼都能夠確保準確收取款項。
mt_raw: Since the launch of FPS in September 2018, 35 banks and 12 stored value facility operators have joined, with five additional banks and one stored value facility operator joining in 2020. FPS usage has steadily grown. As of December 31, FPS had recorded 6.9 million registrations (Figure 1). To facilitate citizens receiving payments from institutions, FPS introduced a new feature on December 6 that uses Hong Kong identity card numbers as account identification codes. Within less than a month of introducing this feature, over 110,000 registrations were recorded. This new function is not used for person-to-person transfers but is exclusively for institutions that already have the payee's Hong Kong identity card number to make payments (such as salary disbursements). Since each citizen's identity card number is unique, using the Hong Kong identity card number as an account identification code ensures accurate receipt of payments even without providing a bank account number.

terms: {'交易量': 'transaction volume', '新冠病毒': 'COVID-19'}
src_raw: 新冠病毒疫情及保持社交距離措施為使用電子支付服務帶來新動力。年內轉數快交易量增長尤其迅速（圖2），於2020年12月的平均每日交易量達505,000宗即時交易（涉及52億港元及9,500萬元人民幣），相當於2019年12月168,000宗的3倍，更是2018年10月轉數快推出首月的10倍。轉數快使用量增加，亦受惠於應用範圍逐步擴大，由最初主要用作個人對個人支付，逐步擴展至繳付帳單（包括政府帳單）、零售及商業支付。
mt_raw: The COVID-19 pandemic and social distancing measures have provided new momentum for the use of electronic payment services. FPS transaction volume grew particularly rapidly during the year (Figure 2), reaching an average of 505,000 instant transactions per day in December 2020, involving HK$5.2 billion and RMB95 million, which is three times the 168,000 transactions in December 2019 and ten times the 50,000 transactions in October 2018 when FPS was launched. The increase in FPS usage was also driven by the gradual expansion of its applications, from primarily person-to-person payments to paying bills (including government bills), retail, and commercial payments.

terms: {'金管局': 'HKMA', '銀行業': 'banking sector', '電子錢包': 'e-wallets'}
src_raw: 金管局與多個政府部門及銀行業一直合作，將轉數快的應用範圍由個人對個人支付，擴展至繳付帳單及其他商戶支付。政府於2019年11月起接受以轉數快繳付帳單，以推廣使用轉數快及便利市民。市民以支援轉數快的手機銀行或電子錢包掃描印於帳單上的二維碼，即可輕鬆繳付稅款、差餉及地租、水費及政府發出的一般繳費單。截至2020年12月經轉數快繳付政府帳單的交易達180萬宗，涉及22億港元。繼繳付政府帳單服務成功推出後，再有4個政府部門由2020年12月21日起接受在指定繳費櫃枱及自助服務機以轉數快二維碼繳費。政府亦正在探討於網上採用轉數快付款的安排。
mt_raw: The HKMA has been working closely with multiple government departments and the banking sector to expand FPS applications from person-to-person payments to bill payments and other merchant payments. Starting in November 2019, the government accepted FPS for bill payments to promote its use and convenience for citizens. Citizens can easily pay taxes, utility bills, and government-issued general payment slips by scanning the QR code on the bill using a mobile banking app or e-wallet. By the end of 2020, there were 1.8 million transactions through FPS for government bills, amounting to HK$2.2 billion. After the successful introduction of the government bill payment service, four additional government departments started accepting FPS QR code payments at designated payment counters and self-service machines from December 21, 2020. The government is also exploring arrangements for online FPS payments.

src_raw: 另一正面的發展是越來越多大小商戶採用轉數快以加強業務營運。支付商戶的交易在2020年12月急增至平均每日100,000宗，較2019年12月增加38倍轉數快普遍用作繳付帳單、應用程式內直接扣帳，以及進行其他網上購物。電子錢包日益普及，亦帶動了以轉數快為帳戶增值的交易量顯著增長。2020年12月平均每日增值的交易量，是2019年12月的7倍。
mt_raw: Another positive development is the growing adoption of FPS by merchants of all sizes to enhance their business operations. Merchant transactions via FPS surged to an average of 100,000 per day in December 2020, representing a 38-fold increase compared to December 2019. FPS is commonly used for bill payments, direct deductions within apps, and other online shopping activities. The increasing popularity of e-wallets has also led to a significant rise in transactions for topping up accounts through FPS. In December 2020, the average daily top-up transactions were seven times those in December 2019.

mt_raw: To enhance public awareness of FPS, the HKMA produced various educational and promotional materials, including television advertisements and a series of tips for smart usage on social media platforms. The HKMA also organized a WhatsApp Sticker Design Competition for secondary school students to increase their understanding of electronic payments. Furthermore, the HKMA promoted the use of FPS for payments and receipts among various charitable organizations and market operators. Several participating banks and stored value facility operators also launched promotional campaigns, offering incentives to attract customers to register and use FPS for transfers and bill payments. Building on the achievements of 2020, the HKMA collaborated with banks and stored value facility operators in early 2021 to promote the electronic distribution of red envelopes through FPS. While the HKMA conducted promotional activities, banks and stored value facility operators offered incentives to encourage customers to use electronic red envelopes, which are environmentally friendly and helpful in combating the pandemic.

mt_raw: Regarding central bank digital currencies (CBDCs), the HKMA continues joint research with the Bank of Thailand to explore the application of CBDCs in cross-border payments, aiming to facilitate payment-versus-payment (PvP) settlements between Hong Kong and Thai banks for Hong Kong dollars and Thai baht. src_raw: 2020年是峰迴路轉的一年，新冠病毒疫情為全球經濟帶來前所未有的挑戰。資產市場於第1 季經歷了大幅調整和震盪後，在主要央行推出超寬鬆的貨幣政策及各地政府實施大規模的財政紓困措施帶動下，得以迅速反彈。由於主要央行大幅下調基準利率並重啟量化寬鬆措施，令國債收益率顯著下跌、債券價格上升。在此投資環境下，外匯基金在2020 年錄得2,358 億港元的投資收入，回報率為5.3%。
mt_raw: 2020 was a year of dramatic changes, as the COVID-19 pandemic brought unprecedented challenges to the global economy. After experiencing significant adjustments and volatility in the first quarter, asset markets rebounded quickly due to ultra-loose monetary policies by major central banks and large-scale fiscal relief measures implemented by governments worldwide. With major central banks significantly lowering benchmark interest rates and restarting quantitative easing programs, sovereign bond yields declined notably while bond prices increased. Under this investment environment, the Exchange Fund recorded investment income of HK$235.8 billion in 2020, with an investment return of 5.3%.

(a) 保障資本；
(b) 確保整體貨幣基礎在任何時候都由流通性極高的美元資產提供十足支持；
(c) 確保流動資金足以維持貨幣及金融穩定；以及

mt_raw: The Exchange Fund is generally divided into two main portfolios: the Backing Portfolio and the Investment Portfolio. The Backing Portfolio holds highly liquid US dollar assets, providing full support for the monetary base in accordance with the Currency Board system. The Investment Portfolio primarily invests in bond and equity markets of Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) member countries to safeguard the value and long-term purchasing power of the assets.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產配置於較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一，以及未來基金存款與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance medium-to-long-term returns, the HKMA has gradually allocated part of the Exchange Fund's assets to more diversified asset classes, including emerging market and mainland China bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure) and real estate. Emerging market and mainland China bonds and equities are held in the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held in the Long-Term Growth Portfolio. The maximum market value of the Long-Term Growth Portfolio is one-third of the accumulated surplus of the Exchange Fund, plus the total of the portions of future fund deposits and deposits of affiliated companies of the Exchange Fund linked to the Long-Term Growth Portfolio.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，會以投資基準方式反映，亦即外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，透過戰略性的資產配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內管理倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund's investment processes are based on strategic asset allocation and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation is reflected in the form of an investment benchmark, i.e., the long-term asset allocation that the Exchange Fund can make to achieve its investment objectives. The Exchange Fund uses the strategic allocation as a guide, and through tactical asset allocation, seeks to generate returns exceeding the benchmark. Therefore, actual allocations often deviate from the benchmark allocation (i.e., the strategic allocation). The difference between the actual and benchmark allocations is called "tactical deviation." After consultation with the EFAC, the Financial Secretary sets the investment benchmark and tracking error limits, and the HKMA is authorized to determine the tactical asset allocation and establish the permissible range of tactical deviations. Portfolio managers can manage their holdings within the permissible range of tactical deviations, profiting from short-term market fluctuations.

mt_raw: In addition to managing assets through internal staff, the HKMA also employs external fund managers to manage approximately 28% of the Exchange Fund's assets, including all listed equity portfolios and other specialised asset classes. src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，風險管理的重要性不言而喻。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂下嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並設立嚴謹的風險監察及合規制度。金管局為投資相關活動設有三重防線以確保有效的風險管理及監察。金管局亦定期監察主要投資風險類別（包括信用、市場、流動性及業務操作風險），並已加強風險管理程序以配合外匯基金的多元化投資。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, the importance of risk management cannot be overstated. The HKMA has established strict control measures and investment guidelines for investment portfolios managed by both internal and external fund managers, and has set up a rigorous risk monitoring and compliance system. The HKMA has three lines of defence for investment-related activities to ensure effective risk management and oversight. The HKMA regularly monitors key investment risk categories (including credit, market, liquidity, and operational risks) and has enhanced risk management procedures to accommodate the Exchange Fund's diversified investments.

src_raw: 金管局訂有一套原則，以評估外匯基金投資項目的ESG風險與機會。就外聘投資經理所管理的資產組合而言，金管局透過獲委任的投資經理執行負責任投資。在甄選、委任及監察外聘投資經理的過程中，金管局會評估其落實ESG的不同範疇，包括ESG管治方面的組織架構、ESG標準及政策、將ESG因素併入投資程序中的情況，以及管理督導的業務活動，即代理投票和與投資組合公司的溝通（例如與投資組合公司管理層商討ESG的事宜）。為彰顯對負責任投資的重視，金管局透過外聘投資經理在管理督導方面扮演的角色，推動更完善的ESG做法。負責管理金管局的香港股票組合及中國內地股票主動投資管理組合的外聘投資經理，須承諾遵守證券及期貨事務監察委員會頒布的《負責任的擁有權原則》，若未能遵守則須作出解釋。至於負責管理已發展市場股票組合的外聘投資經理則需恪守國際公認的ESG標準。此外，金管局又展開聘任後監察計劃，以審視外聘投資經理的代理投票及與投資組合公司溝通的落實概況。
mt_raw: The HKMA has established a set of principles to assess ESG risks and opportunities associated with the Exchange Fund's investment projects. Regarding assets managed by external fund managers, the HKMA implements responsible investment through appointed fund managers. In the selection, appointment, and monitoring of external fund managers, the HKMA evaluates their implementation across several areas, including organisational setup with respect to ESG governance, ESG standards and policies, integration of ESG factors into investment processes, and stewardship activities such as proxy voting and portfolio company engagement programmes. To demonstrate its commitment to responsible investment, the HKMA encourages improved ESG practices through the role of external fund managers in stewardship activities. External fund managers responsible for managing the HK equity portfolio and active investment management of the Mainland China equity portfolio must commit to adhering to the Securities and Futures Commission's Principles of Responsible Ownership, and provide explanations if they fail to do so. External fund managers managing developed market equity portfolios must comply with internationally recognised ESG standards. Additionally, the HKMA has launched a post-appointment monitoring program to review the implementation of proxy voting and portfolio company engagement activities by external fund managers.

src_raw: 至於在公開市場的ESG投資，金管局自2015年起投資於綠色、社會責任及可持續債券（ESG債券），是這個市場的早期投資者之一。此外，金管局亦參與國際金融公司的「聯合貸款組合管理計劃」，而其投資對象聚焦於新興市場的可持續發展項目。在2020年，適逢市場供應增加，金管局增加ESG債券的投資。展望未來，金管局將繼續透過直接投資或持有ESG債券基金等方式，壯大其ESG債券組合。此外，金管局將透過採納ESG股票指數作為被動投資組合的投資基準，推動外聘投資經理建立以ESG為主題的股票投資方針。金管局在未來幾年將會繼續留意以ESG為主題的投資機會，例如主動式的ESG投資組合及低碳為題的投資工具。
mt_raw: Regarding ESG investments in the public market, the HKMA has been an early investor in green, social and sustainability bonds (ESG bonds) since 2015. The HKMA also participates in the International Finance Corporation's (IFC) Managed Co-Lending Portfolio Program, with investments focused on sustainable development projects in emerging markets. In 2020, with increased market supply, the HKMA increased its ESG bond investments. Looking ahead, the HKMA will continue to expand its ESG bond portfolio through direct investments or holding ESG bond funds. Furthermore, the HKMA will promote external fund managers to develop ESG-focused equity investment strategies by adopting ESG stock indices as benchmarks for passive investment portfolios. The HKMA will continue to monitor ESG-themed investment opportunities in the coming years, such as actively managed ESG portfolios and low-carbon investment tools.

src_raw: 私募市場投資方面，金管局在盡職審查過程中檢視專責合夥人的ESG政策及具體措施。金管局的長期增長組合積極投資於具備可持續特點的項目，包括可再生能源基建，而在房地產投資組合亦有吸納具有綠色及可持續特點的倉庫及其他建築物。金管局將在未來繼續物色具備可持續特點的項目，並在房地產投資方面將綠色認證列入為重要考慮因素。金管局與專責合夥人舉行年度ESG工作坊，就良好的ESG作業手法交流意見及經驗。在11月舉行的ESG工作坊上，一眾專責合夥人就新冠病毒疫情對其投資組合公司及ESG投資發展所造成的影響交換意見。為提高私募市場投資的ESG透明度，金管局已要求專責合夥人提供有關其投資項目的ESG資訊，例如氣候變化風險等，以便監察。
mt_raw: In private market investments, the HKMA reviews ESG policies and specific measures of designated partners during due diligence. The HKMA's Long-Term Growth Portfolio actively invests in projects with sustainable characteristics, including renewable energy infrastructure, and incorporates green and sustainable warehouses and other buildings in its real estate investment portfolio. The HKMA will continue to identify projects with sustainable characteristics in the future and will include green certifications as an important consideration in real estate investments. The HKMA holds annual ESG workshops with designated partners to exchange views and experiences on good ESG practices. At the ESG workshop held in November, the designated partners exchanged views on the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on their portfolio companies and ESG investment developments. To increase ESG transparency in private market investments, the HKMA requires designated partners to provide information on ESG aspects of their investment projects, such as climate change risks, for monitoring purposes.

src_raw: 金管局往後仍會密切觀察ESG標準的發展，評估如何將有關標準進一步融入投資程序，當中包括與理念相近的投資者及國際組織互動合作。金管局作為聯合國支持的《負責任投資原則》的簽署人之一，肩負作為全球倡導者的責任，日後將會參與制定ESG最佳作業手法，並推動其他投資者採納負責任的投資方法。金管局亦是非牟利機構 FCLTGlobal 的成員，該機構旨在透過舉辦工作坊及研究，鼓勵以長遠目標為本的業務及投資決策。金管局亦有參與「氣候相關財務資訊披露工作小組」，並為「央行與監管機構綠色金融網絡」的成員。此外，金管局籌辦講座及積極參與投資業界舉辦的活動，分享及推廣有關ESG投資的理念。
mt_raw: The HKMA will continue to closely monitor the development of ESG standards and evaluate how to further integrate these standards into the investment process, including engaging with like-minded investors and international organizations. As a signatory of the United Nations-supported Principles for Responsible Investment, the HKMA bears the responsibility of a global advocate and will participate in the development of ESG best practices, promoting other investors to adopt responsible investment approaches. The HKMA is also a member of the non-profit organisation FCLTGlobal, which aims to encourage long-term-oriented business and investment decisions through workshops and research. The HKMA also participates in the Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures and is a member of the Central Banks and Supervisors' Green Finance Network. In addition, the HKMA organises lectures and actively participates in industry events to share and promote the concept of ESG investment.

src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分。展覽館以互動方式介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。毗鄰展覽館的圖書館收藏超過26,000本書籍、期刊及其他刊物，以供研究香港貨幣、銀行業、金融和中央銀行事務等課題。圖書館亦備存《銀行業條例》第20條規定的「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」及「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」。
mt_raw: The HKMA Information Centre, located on the 55th floor of the International Financial Centre, introduces the HKMA's work and enhances public understanding of monetary and banking affairs. The centre consists of an exhibition hall and a library. The exhibition hall uses interactive methods to introduce the HKMA's work and the development of Hong Kong's monetary and banking sectors, and provides materials and exhibits for research on Hong Kong's monetary, banking, and financial affairs. Adjacent to the exhibition hall, the library houses over 26,000 books, journals, and periodicals for research on topics related to Hong Kong's monetary, banking, financial, and central banking affairs. The library also keeps the "Register of Authorized Institutions and Local Representative Offices" and "Register of Securities Staff of Authorized Institutions" required under Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance.

src_raw: 財政司司長透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的意見，並參考市場薪酬水平及做法，決定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條件。薪酬組合包括現金薪酬及公積金，另設一些基本福利。現金薪酬包括每月固定薪酬（即基本薪酬）及根據員工工作表現每年一次過發放的浮動薪酬。

Cash compensation comprises monthly fixed salary (i.e., base salary) and variable pay paid annually based on employee performance.

mt_raw: The Financial Secretary reviews the remuneration of HKMA staff annually, seeking the advice of the governing committees under his jurisdiction and considering the assessment of the HKMA's performance by the Governance Sub-Committee (GSC), results of the financial industry remuneration survey conducted by independent human resource consultants, and other relevant factors. Individual employees who demonstrate exceptional performance may also receive special adjustments to their remuneration to reward them and maintain competitiveness.

terms: {'浮動薪酬': 'variable pay', '總裁': 'Chief Executive', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 金管局按個別員工的工作表現，分配獲批准用作調整年度固定薪酬及浮動薪酬的款項；而適用於負責投資的員工的浮動薪酬制度，則旨在加強其投資表現與薪酬的連繫。助理總裁及以上職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，是由財政司司長經參考管治委員會的意見後批准，有關員工在會議討論到其薪酬的議案時會避席。主管及以下職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，則由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授權，按照獲批准用作支付薪酬的整筆款項來決定。
mt_raw: The HKMA allocates approved funds for adjusting annual fixed salaries and variable pay based on individual employee performance. The variable pay mechanism applicable to employees involved in investment activities aims to strengthen the link between investment performance and remuneration. Fixed salary adjustments and variable pay payments for Assistant Directors and above are approved by the Financial Secretary after consulting the GSC, with the relevant employees absent from the meeting where their remuneration is discussed. Fixed salary adjustments and variable pay payments for managers and below are decided by the HKMA Chief Executive based on the Financial Secretary's authorization, using the approved lump sum for paying salaries.

src_raw: 金管局在11月與國際金融公司聯合推出綠色商業銀行聯盟，協助各新興市場的銀行制定應對氣候變化的方案。作為聯盟的創始成員及首個區域執行理事，金管局i)在全球金融市場推動發展綠色商業銀行；ii)為商業銀行提供互相學習平台，獲取所需知識、工具及商業資訊，以制定其本身的綠色金融路線圖，並轉型為具公信力的綠色銀行；iii)促進溝通，並探討前沿議題推動全球綠色議程；以及iv)協助聯盟的成員合作，以及把握國際金融公司所識別在未來10年估計高達23萬億美元的新興市場綠色及氣候相關投資機會。
mt_raw: In November, the HKMA jointly launched the Green Commercial Bank Alliance with the International Finance Corporation (IFC) to help banks in emerging markets develop solutions to combat climate change. As a founding member and regional anchor of the alliance, the HKMA i) promotes the development of green commercial banks in global financial markets; ii) provides a peer-to-peer learning platform for commercial banks to gain the knowledge, tools, and business information needed to develop their own green finance road maps and transform into credible green banks; iii) facilitates communication and explores cutting-edge issues to advance the global green finance agenda; and iv) assists alliance members in cooperation and capitalizing on the estimated $23 trillion in emerging market green and climate-related investment opportunities identified by the IFC over the next decade.

mt_raw: Locally, the HKMA collaborates with other financial regulators to coordinate the financial sector's responses to climate and environmental risks.
